title: white-hacker PATCH-STATE.json
description: Per-finding record of the sec-patch ladder (build -> PoC stops -> tests pass -> re-attack) + variant hunt + verdict. Verification CLASS is kept separate from severity (PLAN 6.1): the ladder records what was demonstrated, not how bad the bug is. Validated by scripts/validate_patch_state.py.

tri_state.description: pass = demonstrated to hold; fail = demonstrated to fail; n/a = rung not applicable (e.g. no build system, no existing tests).

finding_id.description: The TRIAGE.json / finding-schema id this patch addresses.

patch_path.description: Path to the proposed diff under ./PATCHES/ (sec-patch writes nowhere else; ADR-010 enforced at the data layer).

variants.description: Sibling call-sites / same-class occurrences found during the variant hunt. May be empty.

verdict.description: Overall outcome (a CLASS, not a severity — PLAN 6.1). patched = ladder green; patch_failed = the fix does not hold (a rung failed); wont_fix = accepted-not-patched; needs_human = requires a human decision/apply.
